description: The single final engineering track: absorbs all remaining implementation across 9 active tracks + DEPLOY-TODO code items so that when it ships the only work left is `railway up` + secret/guardian-set provisioning. Phases: A correctness blockers (sagas-inert fix, warnings), B real cross-chain value primitives (Solana signer, bridge lock/burn/verify, reconcile-retry, custody), C quest F2-F7, D fractionalization + ecosystem tree, E data/query hygiene, F saga operator surface, G doc+bookkeeping close-out.
reopened_reason: Phase H (Alpha Gate) added after two fresh-eyes audits surfaced 8 alpha-blockers: H1 simulated-mode prod guard, H2 admin-token mint, H3 frontend API-URL build-bake + stale SDK ref, H4 phantom backup/restore scripts behind G5 gate, H5 version/CHANGELOG stamps, H6 minimal CI, H7 Bucket-D value-path triage, H8 doc-drift sweep. All 8 closed + 3 genuine product bugs fixed (all-MCP-tools record-link binding, AvatarNFT unsettable token_id, Holon empty-collection no-op) + IntegrationTestBase param-binding harness root-cause. Architect validation: GO, all 10 items PASS.
